zh.lifeSummary: 當Joanna Evans於大約1647年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可多爾斯特時，她的父親Richard Evans37歲，母親Mary Packard28歲。她於1667年1月16日與Joshua Hemenway在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可洛波利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1675年1月27日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joanna Evans于大约1647年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可多爾斯特时，她的父亲Richard Evans37岁，母亲Mary Packard28岁。她于1667年1月16日与Joshua Hemenway在美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可洛波利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1675年1月27日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: Evans
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: derivative of Evan , from Efan, Ifan, medieval forms of Ieuan (from Latin Johannes, the source of English John), dating from c. 1500, with the post-medieval patronymic suffix -s. Welsh Sion was a separate borrowing of English John, and Evan (Ieuan) and Sion developed as independent names.

variants.name: Evanson
meanings: English (Shropshire and Chesire): patronymic meaning ‘son of Evan’. See Evans .
Americanized form of Norwegian Evensen and of the much less common Swedish cognate Evensson. Compare Eavenson 2 and Evenson 1.
Probably also an Americanized form of Swedish Ivansson: patronymic from the personal name Ivan , of Slavic (Russian) origin.

variants.name: Ivans
meanings: English (Warwickshire and Oxfordshire): variant of   Evans  .
In some cases also an Americanized form of Slovenian Ivanc and also of some other Slavic patronymics from the personal name Ivan .

variants.name: Ivens
meanings: Flemish, Dutch, and North German: patronymic from the shortened ancient Germanic personal name Ive, Ivo, from Middle High German îwe ‘(bow of) yew’.

variants.name: Avans
meanings: Probably an altered form of Welsh   Evans  .

variants.name: Evan
meanings: Welsh (southern): from the personal name Evan, itself from Ieuan, a Welsh derivative of Latin Johannes (English John). See Evans .

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

variants.name: Joannah
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

variants.name: Joana
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joanna Evans was born about 1647, in Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Richard Evans, was 37 and her mother, Mary Packard, was 28. She married Joshua Hemenway on 16 January 1667, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 27 January 1675, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joanna Evans est née environ 1647, à Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Richard Evans, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Mary Packard, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Joshua Hemenway le 16 janvier 1667, à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 janvier 1675, à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joanna Evans um 1647 in Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Evans 37 und ihre Mutter Mary Packard 28. Sie hat am 16. Januar 1667 in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten Joshua Hemenway geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. Januar 1675 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna Evans è nata il circa 1647 nel Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Richard Evans, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Mary Packard, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Joshua Hemenway il 16 gennaio 1667, nel Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 27 gennaio 1675, nel Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joanna Evansが約1647年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクドールチェスターで生まれた時，父Richard Evansは37歳，母Mary Packardは28歳であった。1667年1月16日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクロクスブリーでJoshua Hemenwayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1675年1月27日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクロクスブリーで29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joanna Evans(이)가 대략 1647년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 도르체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Evans(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Packard(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1667년 1월 16일 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 록스버이에서 Joshua Hemenway(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1675년 1월 27일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joanna Evans nasceu aproximadamente 1647, em Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Richard Evans, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Mary Packard, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Joshua Hemenway em 16 de janeiro de 1667, em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de janeiro de 1675, em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joanna Evans родилась около 1647 г. в местности дорчестир, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Richard Evans было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Packard, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Joshua Hemenway 16 января 1667 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 27 января 1675 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joanna Evans nació aproximadamente 1647, en Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Richard Evans, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Mary Packard, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Joshua Hemenway el 16 de enero de 1667, en Roxbury, Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 27 de enero de 1675, en Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 29 años.
